summary: Created vercel.json with Vite framework preset, build command (npm run build), output directory (dist), and catch-all SPA rewrite rule for client-side routing. Fixed a build-blocking error by removing a non-existent filterByCategories re-export from src/domain/index.ts. All 315 unit tests pass, build succeeds, and all 19 deployment verification e2e tests pass confirming routes resolve after refresh, no console errors, browse page loads, and random draw mode works.
